NTC OF MTN TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT INTERROGATORIES AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS; DEC; MEMO AND POS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC. HEARING SET FOR NOV-05-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT INTERROGATORIES AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. IT APPEARS THAT THERE IS NO OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION FILED BY ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC.; ACCORDINGLY, THE MOTION IS GRANTED. COUNSEL SHOULD PREPARE AN APPROPRIATE ORDER FOR SUBMISSION TO DEFENDANTS' COUNSEL FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND PRESENT THE PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT AT THE HEARING ON NOV. 5TH. PAUL RENNE, JUDGE PRO-TEM, JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, CLERK, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions; Dec; Memo And Pos
Off Calendar Nov-05-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC.'S Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED. IT APPEARS THAT THERE IS NO OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION FILED BY ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC.; ACCORDINGLY, THE MOTION IS GRANTED. COUNSEL SHOULD PREPARE AN APPROPRIATE ORDER FOR SUBMISSION TO DEFENDANTS' COUNSEL FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND PRESENT THE PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT AT THE HEARING ON NOV. 5TH. Paul Renne, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT
